title: Fix "Error: unrecognized protocol \"TCP\" in port mapping"
body:
"TCP" in upper characters was not recognized as a valid protocol name.

Fix #6948

comments.body: would you consider adding a test to prevent regression?
Is the systemd PID1 test fixed on Master?
